sglang.title: [Bugfix] Fix tokenizer_manager not getting 400 when req is too long
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

After a request's input is validated too long in validate_input_length, we need to override req.origin_input_ids and req.sampling_params.max_new_tokens for the state to be updated in tokenizer_manager. Otherwise, it won't receive a response.
Modifications


Fix the issue by overriding re

vllm.title: [PP] Correct cache size check
vllm.author: zhengy001
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Single long prompt gets preempted(as cannot allocate slots) during decode and leads to recomput and incorrect output length.
Basically, it is because CacheEngine splits kv cache into separate pipeline by self.num_gpu_blocks //= parallel_config.pipeline_parallel_size. Long prompt does not get blocked

vllm.title: Update LMFE version to v0.10.11 to support new versions of transforme…
vllm.author: noamgat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
…rs library
I received reports in vLLM slack that this issue makes compiling vLLM with transformers 4.49 impossible. This fixes that problem.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix qwen2.5-vl overflow issue
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #13817 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

Qwen2.5-VL-3B will overflow with float16 in its ViT encoder, we need to cast the overflow value manually.

vllm.title: [VLM] Generalized prompt updates for multi-modal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR generalizes PromptReplacement to PromptUpdate, and introduces a new type of update, PromptInsertion, that inserts placeholder tokens without having to replace anything in the string.
This should simplify the implementation of #13584
Multi-image support for Molmo will be worked on in another

vllm.title: [Model][Speculative Decoding] Expand DeepSeek MTP code to support k > n_predict
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR extends the DeepSeek MTP implementation such that the number of speculative tokens may be greater than the number of prediction modules. In these such cases, the layers are reused by feeding the hidden states from one into the next.
This will also fix a few issues with the original implement

    (layers): ModuleList(
      (0): DeepseekV2DecoderLayer(

vllm.title: [V1]`SupportsV0Only` protocol for model definitions
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Repurposed from #13943 to add a SupportsV0Only protocol to models that are not compatible with vLLM V1 so that we can programmatically check the compatibility such as in #13726.
Doing this protocol instead of SupportsV1 also helps more easily track these models to migrate them to V1 as well as touch

vllm.title: [Doc] Move multimodal Embedding API example to Online Serving page
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The Multimodal Inputs page currently lists Embedding API with Embedding Inputs which is confusing. To resolve this, this PR moves Embedding API documentation to Online Serving.
Embedding Inputs will be implemented later by #13955

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Disaggregated] patch the inflight batching on the decode node in SimpleConnector to avoid hangs in SimpleBuffer (nccl based)
vllm.author: hasB4K
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hello 👋 ,
While experimenting with disaggregated serving with nccl and vllm, I encountered a bug when running mistral-large.
After a lot of debugging I realized that the inflight batching was the issue. On the decode node you can have a request that is in prefilling (from which the KVCache needs to
